note: Produced by scripts/run_historical_validation.py. Each case is assessed only against what it records at its own cutoff; later knowledge is excluded by construction.

cases.title: Container carriers divert Asia–Europe services away from the Red Sea and Suez routing
facts_known_at_cutoff: Multiple container carriers had publicly announced suspension of Red Sea transits and rerouting via the Cape of Good Hope.
The Suez Canal Authority publishes transit statistics that would show a decline.
Thailand westbound container lanes to Northern Europe and the Mediterranean normally use this corridor.
cases.hindsight_limitation: The duration of the diversion, its eventual freight-rate peak and its effect on Thailand trade volumes were all unknown at this cutoff and must not inform the assessment.

cases.title: Panama Canal Authority restricts daily transit slots during drought conditions
facts_known_at_cutoff: The canal authority had published advisories reducing daily transit slots and applying draft restrictions.
The restriction is a published operating condition of the waterway, not a report about any individual carrier.
cases.hindsight_limitation: How long the restrictions lasted, and whether slot counts were later restored, was unknown at this cutoff.

cases.title: Francis Scott Key Bridge collapse suspends vessel traffic at the Port of Baltimore
facts_known_at_cutoff: The port administration had suspended vessel traffic at Baltimore.
Baltimore is a United States East Coast port with no service relationship to Thailand recorded in this platform's reference data.
cases.hindsight_limitation: The channel reopening timetable and the eventual cargo diversion pattern were unknown at this cutoff. This case exists to check that a large, well-reported event with no established Thailand link produces 'insufficient evidence' rather than an invented transmission chain.

cases.title: Elevated vessel waiting times reported at Singapore container terminals
facts_known_at_cutoff: The port authority had published operational guidance addressing elevated vessel waiting times.
Estimated port call counts had not fallen, so the pressure was not visible in volume data.
Singapore is the principal transshipment hub for Thailand long-haul services.
cases.hindsight_limitation: How long the elevated waiting times persisted, and whether they spread to neighbouring hubs, was unknown at this cutoff. This case exists to check that a congestion conclusion requires an operational-condition source and is never derived from throughput alone.

cases.title: Crude and refined product prices rise sharply, raising bunker and domestic fuel costs
facts_known_at_cutoff: International crude and refined product prices had risen sharply.
Thailand publishes retail fuel prices that track international benchmarks with a lag.
cases.hindsight_limitation: The eventual peak and duration of the price movement were unknown at this cutoff. This case exists to check that an external driver with a complete chain produces potential cost pressure rather than a quantified cost figure.

cases.title: Damage to Baltic Sea subsea telecommunications cables reported
facts_known_at_cutoff: Public reporting described damage to subsea telecommunications cables and an associated investigation.
No port, terminal, canal or carrier had announced any operational change.
cases.hindsight_limitation: This case exists to check that a widely reported security event with no stated Logistics mechanism stays contextual, produces no impact conclusion, and is not admitted to any lane assessment. Whether a mechanism was later established is irrelevant to the assessment at this cutoff.

cases.title: Pasir Panjang oil spill response with port operations reported unaffected
facts_known_at_cutoff: An oil spill response was underway near the terminal.
The operating authority explicitly stated that navigation and berthing were not affected.
cases.hindsight_limitation: This case exists to check the one legitimate use of 'no material impact detected': an actual assessment against explicit negative operational evidence, never an unassessed area.

cases.title: Unverified report of a labour dispute affecting a Southeast Asian container terminal
facts_known_at_cutoff: A discovery source surfaced a lead. Nothing else is known.
No terminal, port authority or carrier has published a corresponding notice.
cases.hindsight_limitation: This case exists to check that a discovery lead is representable, visible, and structurally unable to support a conclusion.

event_impact_separation_examples: EVT-20231030-001: event severity moderate vs worst impact severity low
EVT-20231218-001: event severity high vs worst impact severity moderate
EVT-20240326-001: event severity high vs worst impact severity none
EVT-20240614-002: event severity low vs worst impact severity none
